name: Mushroom Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Butter a 2-quart souffle dish with 1 tablespoon butter.
3. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a 2-quart saucepan.
4. Add shallots, onion, and mushrooms. Cook until softened (10 to 12 minutes). Remove from pan and set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the remaining 2 tablespoons butter and melt over medium heat.
6. Whisk in flour and cook for 3 to 4 minutes.
7. Add vegetable broth and stir until the sauce thickens. Return the mushroom mixture to the pan.
8. Season with salt, pepper, nutmeg, parsley, and cheese. Let cool slightly.
9. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites until stiff.
10. Stir one third of the egg whites into the mushroom mixture.
11. Using a rubber spatula, fold the remaining two thirds of the egg whites into the mushroom mixture.
12. Carefully pour the mixture into the prepared souffle dish.
13. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes.
